term: Knock One Out of the Park / Hit One Out of the Ballpark
pronunciation: /n蓱藧k w蕦n a蕣t 蓹v 冒蓹 p蓱藧rk; h瑟t w蕦n a蕣t 蓹v 冒蓹 藞b蓴藧l藢p蓱藧rk/
englishDefinitions: To do something extremely well, especially to achieve great success with a performance, presentation, or project.
persianTranslation: 毓丕賱蹖 丕賳噩丕賲 丿丕丿賳
賲賵賮賯蹖鬲 亘夭乇诏蹖 亘賴 丿爻鬲 丌賵乇丿賳
examples: Her presentation knocked it out of the park.
The new ad campaign really hit one out of the ballpark.
You knocked that interview out of the park.
